stemHtml: In asymmetric flight, rudder is used to stop yaw and ailerons to bank towards the live engine. The bank angle must be limited to prevent...

options.a: increasing the side force on the fin from sideslip.
options.b: the possibility of a fin stall or structural failure of the vertical tailplane.
options.c: the rudder from losing authority to stop the yaw.
options.d: excessive loss of the vertical component of lift.
